nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for complex or creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to speed up the brainstorming or writing process

nodes.label: Human relational knowledge and tailored teaching
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated generic lessons without personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I know my students in and out; there's no way for AI to know the details about my students

nodes.label: AI capability for complex tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI failure with complex structural tasks
nodes.grounding_span: The model gave me HTML files that were missing crucial elements

nodes.label: AI for student engagement and motivation
nodes.grounding_span: I am concerned with AI affecting my students' ability to read, write, and analyze information

nodes.label: AI as rapid prototyping tool for business needs
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for complex product creation
nodes.grounding_span: If AI can get better at matching complex structuring and logic constraints, I can use it to create more digital products

nodes.label: Student engagement and learning
nodes.grounding_span: the quality of the education just won't be as high

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: I'm very artistic and creative myself, so I enjoy creating materials

nodes.label: Student learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I emphasize writing skills with my students because I fear this is what AI will take from them

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to cut down the brainstorming or writing time

nodes.label: Deliberate resistance to AI in reading and validation tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I am, however, usually very satisfied when I ask it to write reading passages for me at a certain grade level

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in complex Excel tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI made me frustrated recently, to be fair, I asked a rather complex thing of it

nodes.label: Frustration with student AI misuse
nodes.grounding_span: I am concerned with AI affecting my students' ability to read, write, and analyze information

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: If AI can get better at matching complex structuring and logic constraints, I can use it to create more digital products

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I'll either tell it feedback in order to get the output to where I want it

nodes.label: Relational and personifying approach to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I know my students in and out; I'm the human in the lesson with them
